name: Grab Southeast Asia Super App Platform API
what_it_does: Grab Southeast Asia super app platform REST API for merchants, drivers, and technology partners to integrate with Grab's ride-hailing, food delivery, grocery, and digital payments ecosystem across Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Philippines, Vietnam, Cambodia, and Myanmar — a Softbank/Alibaba-backed super app serving 270M+ consumers in Southeast Asia. Enables AI agents to manage GrabFood merchant operations for SEA food delivery automation, handle GrabPay payment for digital wallet checkout automation, access GrabMart for grocery fulfillment automation, retrieve GrabExpress for on-demand courier automation, manage merchant analytics for multi-country performance automation, handle loyalty program for GrabRewards integration automation, access payment processing for Visa/Mastercard acceptance automation, retrieve booking data for ride analytics automation, manage merchant marketing for Grab advertising automation, and integrate Grab with SEA e-commerce, hospitality, and enterprise platforms for end-to-end Southeast Asian super app automation.
use_cases: Accepting GrabPay digital wallet payments from SEA consumers for merchant checkout automation agents
Managing GrabFood restaurant menu and receiving delivery orders for SEA food platform automation agents
Integrating GrabExpress on-demand courier for same-day delivery fulfillment automation agents
Accessing merchant analytics across multiple SEA markets for performance reporting automation agents
not_for: Markets outside Southeast Asia (Grab is SEA-focused super app not available in other regions)
Consumer-facing ride booking applications (Grab API is for merchants, developers, and partners only)
Pure ride-hailing fleet management (Grab's driver partner API is separate from merchant API)
best_when: A merchant, brand, or technology platform in Southeast Asia wanting AI agents to integrate GrabPay, GrabFood, or GrabExpress into e-commerce, food delivery, or logistics operations across Grab's 8-country SEA ecosystem.
avoid_when: COUNTRY-SPECIFIC PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: Grab operates under separate country entities with different partner agreements per market (Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, etc.); automated single SEA agreement assumption creates limited country access. GRABPAY CONSUMER WALLET REQUIRES REDIRECT: GrabPay checkout requires consumer to authenticate in Grab app; automated background payment processing creates integration failure; automated checkout must redirect to Grab deep link or web checkout. GRAB API SURFACE IS LARGE: Grab has separate APIs for Payments, GrabFood, GrabMart, GrabExpress, GrabAds; automated unified Grab API assumption underestimates complexity; automated must identify correct API surface for each use case. DEVELOPER PROGRAM APPROVAL: Grab's Merchant API and Partner API require program approval; automated self-service key assumption creates waiting for approval.

auth.notes: Grab uses OAuth 2.0 with PKCE for partner and merchant authentication. REST API with JSON. Singapore HQ. Founded 2012 by Anthony Tan and Tan Hooi Ling. NASDAQ:GRAB (SPAC merger 2021, ~$40B valuation). Backed by SoftBank, Alibaba, Toyota, Hyundai. Products: GrabCar (ride-hailing), GrabFood, GrabMart, GrabExpress, GrabPay, GrabFinance, GrabInsurance. 270M+ registered users. 8 SEA countries: SG, MY, ID, TH, PH, VN, KH, MM. Competes with Gojek in Indonesia/regional.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved partners; production requires Grab partner program approval
pricing.paid_tiers: GrabPay: transaction fee per payment; GrabFood commission: 25-30%; GrabExpress: per-delivery fee
pricing.notes: Singapore SG. NASDAQ listed. Per-transaction/commission. Partner program required. Multi-country.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client per country; order webhooks near real-time; payment APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: GRABPAY REQUIRES CONSUMER REDIRECT: GrabPay checkout requires consumer authentication in Grab app via deep link or web redirect; automated server-side payment creates integration failure; automated must redirect consumer to Grab checkout URL

COUNTRY-SPECIFIC GRAB ENTITIES: Grab operates under separate legal entities in each SEA country; automated single API key for all SEA creates country-access restrictions; automated must obtain country-specific credentials for each target market

SEPARATE APIs FOR EACH PRODUCT: Grab has distinct APIs for GrabPay, GrabFood, GrabExpress, GrabAds; automated single Grab API assumption creates missing capabilities; automated must integrate each relevant Grab product API separately

PARTNER PROGRAM APPROVAL TAKES TIME: Grab's partner program involves review and approval process; automated immediate sandbox access assumption creates waiting period; automated must plan for partner onboarding lead time

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION: Grab webhooks include signature for verification; automated unverified webhook processing creates spoofed order vulnerability; automated must verify Grab webhook signatures before processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: SEA super app. MAS, PDPA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2+PKCE. SG/SEA. Consumer payment and order data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Super app platform. MAS, PDPA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. SG/SEA. Consumer and payment data.
